refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link status continuously.
FR2: Manage link recovery and failover mechanisms to maintain availability.
FR3: Report link status and alerts to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network link management with automatic failover.
DP2: Use adaptive telemetry data compression to optimize link usage.
DP3: Integrate proactive link health monitoring and predictive maintenance alerts.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network link management with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Dependency on network hardware and telemetry interface
Interaction with Teleoperation and Safety Services modules
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates link availability management, minimizing coupling by encapsulating failover logic.

assumptions_risks: Assumes redundant network hardware is available and reliable.
Risk of failover delay impacting link availability.
Risk of integration complexity with Teleoperation and Safety Services.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding adaptive telemetry compression (DP2) if failover alone does not meet availability targets.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for managing teleoperation link and related network communication.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection managed for redundancy and failover.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and health data to other modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands that depend on link availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of link management.
Vehicle module less relevant for network link management.
Highest containment score; natural ownership of teleoperation link.
Safety Services monitors alerts but does not manage link directly.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management in Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overload of Teleoperation module responsibilities.
Interface complexity with Safety Services for safety-critical alerts.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider splitting link management if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant link management with failover) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and meets availability requirements.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if failover logic is duplicated across modules.
Interface coordination needed with Safety Services for alerts.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment for DP implementation, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and link availability statistics is feasible within Teleoperation module scope.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Review interface definitions with Safety Services to ensure clear alert pathways.
Plan for scalability if Teleoperation module scope grows.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a viable DP, and assigns a suitable IM with clear interfaces and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link status continuously.
FR2: Manage link recovery and failover mechanisms to maintain availability.
FR3: Report link status and alerts to relevant modules.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Teleoperation module can handle additional responsibilities.
evidence_needed: Link availability measurement data during operation.
